text_en: Identify regulatory factors and inter-organ circuits governing adipose tissue, skeletal muscle, liver and systemic energy homeostasis.
text_zh: 解析脂肪、骨骼肌、肝脏及全身能量稳态中的关键调控因子与器官互作网络。

text_en: Define causal host–microbe and microbe–metabolite interactions in obesity, diabetes, fatty liver disease, inflammation and aging.
text_zh: 解析肥胖、糖尿病、脂肪肝、炎症与衰老中的宿主–菌群及菌群–代谢物因果互作。

text_en: Integrate transcriptomics, proteomics, 16S, metagenomics and clinical data to discover mechanisms, biomarkers and intervention targets.
text_zh: 整合转录组、蛋白质组、16S、宏基因组与临床数据，发现机制、标志物及干预靶点。

text_en: Develop AI-enabled scientific tools, functional foods, probiotics/postbiotics, living medicines and computational drug-discovery platforms.
text_zh: 开发AI科研工具、功能食品、益生菌/后生元、活菌药物及计算药物发现平台。
